memberdef.name: SBOX4
memberdef.initializer: do { a = SBx1[a]; b = SBx1[b]; c = SBx1[c]; d = SBx1[d]; } while(0)

memberdef.name: ROTATE4
memberdef.initializer: do { unsigned char t; t = a; a = SBx1[b]; b = SBx1[c]; c = SBx1[d]; d = SBx1[t]; } while(0)

memberdef.name: ROTATE2
memberdef.initializer: do { unsigned char t; t = a; a = SBx1[b]; b = SBx1[t]; } while(0)

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned char *in, unsigned char *out, AES_BLOCK iv, int max_blk)
memberdef.name: aesCbcEncrypt

memberdef.argsstring: (AES_BLOCK res, const AES_BLOCK src, unsigned int roundval)
memberdef.name: applyKey
